chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI SUIT NO.683/2005 Date Order with signature of Judge FOR ORDERS ON 10535/2018 30.07.2018. Mr. M. Ishaq Ali advocate for plaintiff alongwith plaintiff Syed M. Asif advocate for defendants alongwith attorney of defendants No.1 & 3 ---------------------------------- Urgency is granted. The parties through application bearing CMA No.23/2018, under the terms & conditions mentioned therein, are seeking disposal of the matter in terms of compromise / settlement between the parties. In support of this application plaintiff and the defendants` attorney have also sworn their respective affidavits. Plaintiff and attorney of defendants No.1 & 3 are present, they admit and acknowledge contents of this application and the affidavits filed in support thereof. In the circumstances, CMA No.23/2018 is allowed and the suit is decreed in terms of compromise / settlement reached between the parties and mentioned in CMA No.23/2018. Suit is disposed of. JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI P.A
